note: [PROPOSAL ruling, ground-truth location]: the Phase 13 spec's §8 sketch put this at data/manifest.json; data/ is reserved for gitignored runtime state (see services/datasets/dataset_loader.py's module docstring ruling), so the manifest lives here instead, alongside the datasets/ tree it describes.

out_of_scope_this_build.note: [PROPOSAL ruling, §8 scope]: Dataset 2 (Python Automation, D4-D6) and Dataset 3 (Operations, D7, itself spec-marked optional) are out of scope for this build pass -- D1-D3+D8 satisfy the spec's own stated exit criteria for a first KASE regression dataset, and adding two more full dataset narratives is a separate, additive follow-up rather than a blocker.
